description: Returns live damage, points, and timer data for a specific round of an active battle.

roundNumber.description: 1-indexed round number to retrieve live data for.

output.description: Live round state including damages, points, and next tick time.

notes: The round object contains: isActive (boolean), attackerDamages (number), defenderDamages (number), attackerPoints (number), defenderPoints (number), nextTickAt (ISO 8601 timestamp). Poll this endpoint to track real-time battle progress.
